question: Define a `Book` class with private members `title`, `author`, and `isbn` (string types). Implement a constructor to initialize these members and public getter methods for each. Include a `displayBookInfo` method that prints all book details.

test_cases.expected:
Book Title (direct access): The Lord of the Rings
Title: The Lord of the Rings
Author: J.R.R. Tolkien
ISBN: 978-0618053267

errors: Attempting to access a private member (myBook.title) directly from outside the class, violating encapsulation principles. This results in a compiler error due to access restrictions.
